ddls:
CREATE TABLE "skills" (
  "skill_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each skill */,
  "skill_name" TEXT /* Name of the skill */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the skill (e.g., Offense, Defense, Utility) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the skill */,
  "cooldown_time" INTEGER /* Time in seconds before the skill can be used again */,
  "mana_cost" INTEGER /* Amount of mana required to use the skill */,
  "is_passive" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the skill is passive or active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("skill_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "buffs" (
  "buff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each buff */,
  "buff_name" TEXT /* Name of the buff */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the buff (e.g., Damage, Healing, Resistance) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the buff */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Default duration of the buff in seconds */,
  "stacks" INTEGER /* Maximum number of stacks the buff can have */,
  "is_renewable" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the buff can be renewed before it expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("buff_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "skill_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each skill statistic */,
  "skill_id" INTEGER /* ID of the skill */,
  "average_effectiveness" REAL /* Average effectiveness percentage of the skill */,
  "min_effectiveness" REAL /* Minimum effectiveness percentage of the skill */,
  "max_effectiveness" REAL /* Maximum effectiveness percentage of the skill */,
  "average_duration" REAL /* Average duration of the skill */,
  "min_duration" REAL /* Minimum duration of the skill */,
  "max_duration" REAL /* Maximum duration of the skill */,
  "average_cooldown_time" REAL /* Average cooldown time of the skill */,
  "min_cooldown_time" REAL /* Minimum cooldown time of the skill */,
  "max_cooldown_time" REAL /* Maximum cooldown time of the skill */,
  "average_mana_cost" REAL /* Average mana cost of the skill */,
  "min_mana_cost" REAL /* Minimum mana cost of the skill */,
  "max_mana_cost" REAL /* Maximum mana cost of the skill */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_skill_statistics_skill_id FOREIGN KEY ("skill_id") REFERENCES skills ("skill_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "buff_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each buff statistic */,
  "buff_id" INTEGER /* ID of the buff */,
  "average_effectiveness" REAL /* Average effectiveness percentage of the buff */,
  "min_effectiveness" REAL /* Minimum effectiveness percentage of the buff */,
  "max_effectiveness" REAL /* Maximum effectiveness percentage of the buff */,
  "average_duration" REAL /* Average duration of the buff */,
  "min_duration" REAL /* Minimum duration of the buff */,
  "max_duration" REAL /* Maximum duration of the buff */,
  "average_stacks" REAL /* Average number of stacks the buff has */,
  "min_stacks" INTEGER /* Minimum number of stacks the buff has */,
  "max_stacks" INTEGER /* Maximum number of stacks the buff has */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_buff_statistics_buff_id FOREIGN KEY ("buff_id") REFERENCES buffs ("buff_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_skills" (
  "player_skill_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player-skill relationship */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "skill_id" INTEGER /* ID of the skill */,
  "proficiency" REAL /* Proficiency level of the player in the skill (e.g., 0.0 to 1.0) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_skill_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_skills_skill_id FOREIGN KEY ("skill_id") REFERENCES skills ("skill_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_buffs" (
  "player_buff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player-buff relationship */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "buff_id" INTEGER /* ID of the buff */,
  "usage_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the player has used the buff */,
  "last_used_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last time the buff was used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_buff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_buffs_buff_id FOREIGN KEY ("buff_id") REFERENCES buffs ("buff_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "skill_dependencies" (
  "dependency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each skill dependency */,
  "skill_id" INTEGER /* ID of the skill */,
  "dependent_skill_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dependent skill */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dependency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_skill_dependencies_skill_id FOREIGN KEY ("skill_id") REFERENCES skills ("skill_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_skill_dependencies_dependent_skill_id FOREIGN KEY ("dependent_skill_id") REFERENCES skills ("skill_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "skill_synergies" (
  "synergy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each skill synergy */,
  "skill_id" INTEGER /* ID of the skill */,
  "synergistic_skill_id" INTEGER /* ID of the synergistic skill */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("synergy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_skill_synergies_synergistic_skill_id FOREIGN KEY ("synergistic_skill_id") REFERENCES skills ("skill_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_skill_synergies_skill_id FOREIGN KEY ("skill_id") REFERENCES skills ("skill_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "skill_exclusions" (
  "exclusion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each skill exclusion */,
  "skill_id" INTEGER /* ID of the skill */,
  "excluded_skill_id" INTEGER /* ID of the excluded skill */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exclusion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_skill_exclusions_skill_id FOREIGN KEY ("skill_id") REFERENCES skills ("skill_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_skill_exclusions_excluded_skill_id FOREIGN KEY ("excluded_skill_id") REFERENCES skills ("skill_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "buff_dependencies" (
  "dependency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each buff dependency */,
  "buff_id" INTEGER /* ID of the buff */,
  "dependent_buff_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dependent buff */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dependency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_buff_dependencies_buff_id FOREIGN KEY ("buff_id") REFERENCES buffs ("buff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_buff_dependencies_dependent_buff_id FOREIGN KEY ("dependent_buff_id") REFERENCES buffs ("buff_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "buff_synergies" (
  "synergy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each buff synergy */,
  "buff_id" INTEGER /* ID of the buff */,
  "synergistic_buff_id" INTEGER /* ID of the synergistic buff */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("synergy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_buff_synergies_synergistic_buff_id FOREIGN KEY ("synergistic_buff_id") REFERENCES buffs ("buff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_buff_synergies_buff_id FOREIGN KEY ("buff_id") REFERENCES buffs ("buff_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "buff_exclusions" (
  "exclusion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each buff exclusion */,
  "buff_id" INTEGER /* ID of the buff */,
  "excluded_buff_id" INTEGER /* ID of the excluded buff */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exclusion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_buff_exclusions_excluded_buff_id FOREIGN KEY ("excluded_buff_id") REFERENCES buffs ("buff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_buff_exclusions_buff_id FOREIGN KEY ("buff_id") REFERENCES buffs ("buff_id")
)
